items.title: Odd WebLogic Request. Possible CVE-2026-21962 Exploit Attempt or AI Slop?, (Wed, Jan 28th)
items.content: <article>I was looking for possible exploitation of CVE-2026-21962, a recently patched WebLogic vulnerability. While looking for related exploit attempts in our data, I came across the following request:</article>

Scanning Webserver with /$(pwd)/ as a Starting Path, (Sun, Jan 25th)
items.content: <article>Based on the sensors reporting to ISC, this activity started on the 13 Jan 2026. My own sensor started seeing the first scan on the 21 Jan 2026 with limited probes. So far, this activity has been limited to a few scans based on the reports available in ISC [5] (select Match Partial URL and Draw):</article>
